column1: この桃は甘みがあって、とても美味しい。
column2: このももはあまみがあって、とてもおいしい。
column3: This peach has a lovely sweetness to it and is delicious.
column5: い-Adj[stem] + み (e.g., 甘み, 悲しみ, 重み, 温かみ)
column6: nominalises an い-adjective to express the inherent quality or feeling; more experiential than さ
column8: み = inherent felt quality (softer, often sensory); さ = measurable degree/extent; 感 = sense/feeling (different suffix)
